question: The scatterplot shows age versus salary for several individuals. Based on the chart, which statement is most appropriate?

options.A: It is clear that individuals aged 25–30 earn significantly more than those aged 35–40.
options.B: Individuals aged 35–40 definitely have the highest salaries in the dataset.
options.C: The chart suggests some variation in salary with age, but the plot is too small to reliably determine which specific age group earns the most.
options.D: All age groups shown earn exactly the same salary.

explanation: The individuals in the chart between the ages of 25 and 30 have the highest salary. The small size of the chart may cause difficulty in accurately identifying the specific trends of salary in certain age ranges.
